pattern: In a preorder sequence the first value is the root and the run of smaller values that follows is its entire left subtree, so a bound-guided pass rebuilds the BST in one sweep.
hints: The first element of any preorder slice is the subtree's root; everything after it that is smaller belongs to the left subtree and the rest to the right.
Because it is a BST, you can carry an upper bound: keep consuming values into the left subtree while they stay below the current root, then the remainder forms the right subtree.
Walk the array with a shared index, building a node and recursing with a tightened bound for the left child and the inherited bound for the right child.

edge_inputs.description: root then only a right child
strictly increasing makes a right-leaning chain
strictly decreasing makes a left-leaning chain

stress.description: random valid BST preorder built by shuffling a search-tree insertion order
stress.note: values are distinct so the BST is well defined
